title: FRI Dehradun – Project Scientist, Research Associate, Junior Project Fellow, Project Assistant – 11 Posts
shortInfo: Forest Research Institute Dehradun (FRI Dehradun) Recruitment 2026 for 11 posts of Project Scientist, Research Associate, Junior Project Fellow, Project Assistant. Candidates with M.Tech/M.E/M.Sc, M.Sc can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 26-05-2026, 28-05-2026, 29-05-2026. For detailed information please visit FRI Dehradun official website.

basic_details.job_title: FRI Dehradun Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 11 Project Scientist, Research Associate and More Posts

age_limit.age_details: Project Scientist-III: 45 years, Project Scientist-II: 40 years, Research Associate & Project Associate: 35 years, Junior Project Fellow: 28 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST, Women, PH, OBC)

qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral Degree, M.Tech/M.E/M.Sc, M.Sc in Agriculture/Botany/Biotechnology/Chemistry/Biochemistry, Bachelor's degree in Science.
